Listen, who are you anyway? Walking around here, asking questions... Whose are you, mister? You should leave while you can...

Listen here: life for us is hard and sad. We all walk under God, and we also walk under our boss. So, buddy, imagine how hard a crust of bread comes to us. Stalkers are all cocky. You come to one with your whole soul, and he tries to put a bullet in your forehead, bullish ugly bastard. They walk around, throwing their weight around, but they can't keep order. They don't want to help the boys and they get greedy. So we keep spinning...
Heard about the underground? The boys poked in there, and there was this huge door. We thought: nice, maybe we can dig up something there. But no way in... Tough luck.
Every day brings news from every district. Just keep your ears spread wide and hang more noodles on them...
What's new here? Same old. We get chewed out every other day: you get the loot, we get the duty roster. They chase us like Sidor's goats...
My combat boots are shot. And the quartermaster won't issue new ones. Probably drank them away... sick of all this shit!

I'm sick of it all! An anomaly here, a stalker charging in there with a sawed-off! What is it for you out there, smeared with honey or something? The colonel came by, spitting all over: "Why aren't you securing it, why are you violating orders, why, why ...?" Let him stand here himself! Demob can't come soon enough!
Not much new with us... The boys here are untested, and they send them here right away. I feel sorry for them...

You know, in our unit there's a stone. Not here... back there, beyond the perimeter. It's called Fallen at a Combat Post... But where are the battles? Who is fighting whom here? Damn Zone, curse it...
Heard a Burer was here - insane! Three meters tall! And someone put it down, imagine that! Lucky bastards. A hulk like that must have had a pile of artifacts...
Thank you very much.
Hello!
Well, hello.
Hello! Duty runs everything here. Keep that in mind if you don't want trouble.
Well, hello.
Good day.
At your service.
Hello, man!
Hello!
Oh, hello!
Hello.
Greetings.
Hello, stalker!
Greetings, stalker!
Hello! You're on Duty territory. Rules are simple here: treat everyone like a human being, and everything will be fine.
Hello, stalker!
Hello there!
Hi, man!
Aloha!
Hello, man!
Hey, you, why are you here? Keep moving.
What do you need?
Well? Keep walking.
Move along. Nothing to stare at.
Well, what do you want?
Good health to you!
I don't have time for chatter. Go on, head to the Bar.
Oh, hello! Better not get close to the factory. It's a dead place.
Hello, stalker! Be careful here: dead men keep pouring out of the complex.
Hello. Are you here on business?
Salute!
Hello! Want some advice? Don't even think about going past Барьер [TERM?] - some kind of radiation there will fry your brains in no time!
Hello!
Hey there!
Hey! Heard about the Scorcher? From here it's already within arm's reach, so I don't advise pushing farther north.
Well, hello! I see you're a risk-taker too, since you weren't afraid to poke your nose into Radar. Keep your eyes open, it's very dangerous here.
Greetings! Terrible place, isn't it?
Oh, a living soul! Uh... you are alive, aren't you?
Hello!
Hello!
Hello!
Well, what are you shaking here for? Got something to say, say it!
What are you staring at? Who the hell are you?
What do you want, little punk?
Come on then, start rattling about that... what is it... the Bolshoi Theater.
And what kind of bird is this? Got some business, or what?
Hello, man! You don't happen to have vodka on you, do you? Don't think it's for me, I need to grease the soldiers for passage under the bridge. I'd pay you back later... somehow.
Oh, hello! How are you holding up?
Hello, hello!
Well, hello!
Hello! Any idea why the army boys got so fired up around here the other day?
How are things, fellow stalker? My advice to you: don't deal with the local gopniks.
Hey, stalker! You shouldn't hang around here too much. The thieves have a den nearby, so running into trouble is easy as breathing.
Buddy, help!
Somebody help!
Guard, I'm wounded! To me!
Help! I'm dying!
Buddy... Medkit... I'm dying... Help!
Hey! Help me out....
Don't leave me! Medkit...
Stalker... give me a medkit... I'm dying... Help me, and I'll help you...
Stalker... give me a medkit... I'm dying... Help me, and I'll help you...
Stalker... give me a medkit... I'm dying... Help me, and I'll help you...
Stalker... give me a medkit... I'm dying... Help me, and I'll help you...
Stalker... give me a medkit... I'm dying... Help me, and I'll help you...
Boys, medkit!
Medkit over here!
Anti-shock, boys! Hurry!
Medkit, men!
Somebody!.. Give me a medkit!
Friend, medkit... medkit!
Help me, man!
Share a medkit, friend, huh?
Buddy! Medkit...
Stalker, friend... Help...
Hey, help me, man... Medkit...

I'd love to put every last Monolith member down, damn them! Those Monolith members, motherfuckers... Their roofs have completely slid off. There was a time when they were still peaceful... I remember meeting one in the Zone once, and of course he started up his Monolith drivel again, like: "Brothers, the Monolith called to me in the night. I spoke with it. It was beautiful in its majesty. I nearly went blind, but its light filled me with great power! I know, I feel that its power abides with us all! It told me that only firm faith can defeat evil. It told me its power will fill only the faithful. It also revealed to me that our victory is near," and I told him: "Go to hell with your Monolith!" He boiled over and yelled: "The time will come, and we will cleanse the Zone of unbelievers!" and all that. Looks like the bastard wasn't lying: now they've gone completely feral, pouring out of the CNPP in crowds, shooting everyone without distinction, totally out of their minds!
I feel like smoking... Got matches? You don't smoke? Ah, no luck for me today...

I'll go talk with the men... You, young stalker, if you see a PDA message about Семецкий [TERM?]'s death, don't get distracted. It's one of the Zone's legends. That message will come to you more than once. They say Семецкий [TERM?] is one of those who managed to reach the Monolith. What did he ask for? Right, immortality. So now he crawls around the Zone, dying over and over. Some people have even seen him, though they might be lying. Ah, Zone, you are full of secrets and riddles... Have I bothered you too much with my legends? Fine then, go in peace. Good hunting.

Want me to tell you a joke? Three stalkers argued over which of them was tougher, and decided this: whoever drives more people out of the stalker bar is the toughest. The first grabs a heavy machine gun, bursts into the bar: 
- Everyone out, now! - half the crowd clears out, but ten stalkers stay behind and give him such a beating he barely gets out.
The next day, the second one does some trick, pretends to be a mutant, and slips into the bar. The crowd scatters, some through the window, some through the door, but a Duty squad stays behind and beats him half to death. A couple days later, the third one just walks into the bar and starts coughing from the doorway: 
- Kha-kkha-ghuhu-ghuhu-kha, hrrrk-ptooey! Damn syphilis!

I'll go to the men and hear some new stories... Want me to tell you one? There is this story, supposedly true, happened long ago, long before I got here myself. So, here it is... Some foreigner decided to become a stalker, to make money, supposedly; he was some kind of scientist, I think... Hell knows what he wanted here, but he barely understood a damn word of Russian... And really, nobody knows how he even reached the Zone and Barkeep. Someone outside the Zone recommended Barkeep to him. So he didn't understand Russian worth a damn, though he thought otherwise... Started pestering Barkeep in broken language... Barkeep fought with him for a couple hours. The man either needed to get somewhere or wanted to find someone... In short, Barkeep didn't understand anything clearly and decided to send that weirdo to Freedom territory. He tells him: go here and there, that territory is controlled by Freedom fighters, they'll explain everything to you. Back then, for some reason, people still thought Freedomers were on good terms with English. So from everything Barkeep said, that foreign miracle somehow liked the word "control," since it's the same for them in English, and when he came to Freedom he started questioning everyone: "Control, Controller, Controller," waving his hand toward Duty and repeating his line. They say Freedom got scared badly, raised the whole camp, and it was night too; they stood watch on the towers until morning. That guy was later kicked out of Freedom, and Duty never saw him after that either. I doubt he found what he was looking for in the Zone...

Lots of people have turned into "trash pickers" now. Before, nobody even looked in the heaps: so much radiation it would hard-boil your balls in half an hour. But now that loot has gotten scarce, they wrap themselves in protection, take some chems, and off they go digging. You can find all kinds of things there, though mostly small stuff.

I need to rest... Rookies have gotten completely brazen lately. They climb into anomalies and die, die, die... In the last two days, imagine it, five young stalkers vanished. And do they get even a little more careful? Not a damn bit. Муха [TERM?] recently took three blockheads into his squad. Where are they now? And he came back with loot, made a nice haul too. Maybe he killed them himself? No, probably not... he's honest... relatively. Anyway, from what I can see you're a rookie too, so keep your eyes open. Good luck.

I'm sitting here thinking... Do you know about the classified laboratories deep in the Zone?.. Supposedly they're still operating... Yeah, yeah... Hard to understand how anyone could have survived there at all, with no supplies, no power... So the question is: maybe it isn't people working there? I talked to one type here... He didn't see the laboratories himself. No, not himself, but on a scanner at Yantar he picked up some strange transmissions. They talked about some laboratory. And another man swore to that first one that he once ran into a figure in a suit like a stalker's, but more advanced. And supposedly that half-transparent figure told him to get the hell out of there. "Don't interfere, leave, we're working here." Well, the guy shit himself... naturally! Which of us had ever seen anything like that before?.. On the other hand, it supposedly happened near Radar... Yeah. So it's probably not true... But then again... mutations can be different, probably. Maybe they aren't people anymore, but some kind of energy entities? Huh?
What business is it of yours where I'm going? I roam the Zone with my own buddies, and we don't need freeloaders.

Nothing yet... Want a joke? A pack of rats is running along. A stalker steps out in front of them: "Any tough guys here?" he asks. "No." "Then one artifact from every rat, and keep running." Next day, same thing! The rats decide to call in a Blind Dog. They run. The stalker steps out and stops the pack: "Any tough guys here?" The rats part, and the Blind Dog steps out: "Well, I guess I'm tough." The stalker steps aside, and a Controller comes out: "All right, ten artifacts from the tough ones, one from everyone else! And keep running!"

I'm thinking of learning more about the factions... Listen, man, do you know anything solid about "Перехват [TERM?]"? They say they're specialists, career military! But the way they work, huh?! The way they work! These aren't the assholes at the checkpoints! Not only do they crawl into the deepest shit, they sit in the Zone for months! I'm not making it up! They have bases, several at once, tons of caches, and helicopters keep dropping supplies near the perimeter for them. Their commander is some Громов [TERM?]... I think the surname is fake, not real; they call him either "Major" or "Гром [TERM?]." Don't believe me?! Пахомыч [TERM?] once caught a Перехват [TERM?] transmission! Caught it and ran like hell, or they would have killed him for nothing... Secrecy, damn it! Everyone knows Пахомыч [TERM?], right? There you go! It's not bullshit, it's a serious outfit. Hell knows what they found so interesting here, but they work like you wouldn't believe! If I worked even a third that well - no, ten percent that well! - I'd already have built myself a ten-story house in Сочах [TERM?]... They say they have a gadget that spots monsters from two hundred meters away. Any creature! Clear as day, then you can stroll through the Zone and spit as you go... And then, they say, there are some other operators too. Not military, more like our kind... In short, some of them made it to the center of the Zone. Not only made it, they say they can tame creatures too! They don't go outside the perimeter to the mainland at all, and nobody goes to them either... well, except maybe those who were born with a path to the Саркофаг [TERM?] written in their fate. They have so many artifacts they could wipe their asses with them! Duty members know about them well... they know, the bastards, they fight them, and keep quiet! Ask any of those cops and he says: "Fairy tales." Well, aren't they fuckers, huh?!

What are you even talking about... Something happened here... I had a disaster, fucked away my backpack full of loot. Just like that! I thought I'd come back with a big payday, but then disaster: at night a blind dog popped out from under the bushes and growled at me. I nearly shit my pants from fear, even mistook it for a Pseudodog at first, because you can hear blind dogs coming, but those things are silent. So I threw my backpack and ran! At first I thought that bastard would chase me, but it grabbed the backpack and vanished in some unknown direction. I'll go on a new run. By the way, don't want to come with me? No? Fine then, see you.

I'm thinking of going out for loot, but they say there's a Controller there... Though I heard that during emissions, Controllers glitch out hard and can't do anything, basically, so you can take them barehanded...

Relax, stop fussing... Here's a joke, a little dumb but funny. 
In the evening, stalkers are sitting in a tavern, drinking beer, telling stalker tales... 
One says: 
- The other day in the Zone I met a monster this bi-i-ig, emptied all my ammo into it, barely put it down with a grenade launcher. 
Everyone: 
- Who-o-oa! 
The second says: 
- And yesterday in the Zone I saw a monster this bi-i-i-ig, emptied all my ammo into it, grenades didn't touch it, only dropped it with a flamethrower. 
Everyone: 
- Who-o-o-oa! 
The third says: 
- And today in the Zone a monster THIS BI-I-I-I-IG spotted me... 
Everyone at once: 
- Wha-a-at? 
The stalker says calmly: 
- What do you mean, what? I barely washed my pants clean back at base!

I want to learn more about different stalkers... Have you heard of Проводник [TERM?]? The very first stalker. The first to start going into the Zone, and still alive. They say he'll guide you anywhere. The problem is finding him: he doesn't put up posters with his address... And he doesn't agree to guide just anyone either. Supposedly he takes plenty of cash, but if you found him and made a deal, be sure he'll get you where you need to go, solid as iron. That's who I'd like to talk with. He must have seen what lies beyond Radar...

I should get some sleeping pills, maybe... You know what I'll tell you? In this part of the Zone, you can barely sleep... I'm lucky, I can't fall asleep anyway, but people get such nightmares that sometimes they don't wake up in the morning... heart rupture, for example. Some die, others have their roofs torn clean off... Recently a rumor went around that there is a remedy. If you absolutely have to sleep, you should find an old bucket... or at least a big pot... a wash boiler, maybe... Main thing is that it's whole. Stick your head in it and sleep safe as a baby. Laugh, go on. I'll look at you in a couple days when you start falling over from exhaustion. Smartass... But tell me yourself, why the hell have the army boys started wandering around here in fancy helmets lately? Exactly! For two years or so, not a word, not a sign, and lately they keep showing up! Their helmets are some new kind; the boys found one body and told me. There was a mesh inside, made of thin copper wire, fastened to the liner. So think about it: what kind of harness is that, and what the hell is it for? And in general, that "bzz-bzz-bzz" is not for nothing, I'm telling you. There's not much to pick from anomalies here - wrong grounds, other sectors are safer and have fatter pieces too... My thinking is, they're marking approaches. Preparing a bridgehead. They want to break through to the Саркофаг [TERM?], mark my words. Soon it's going to blow so hard nobody will think it is little. Mark my words... Main thing is to be far away from here when it happens.

I'm getting my weapon ready just in case... Heard the news, huh? Yesterday there was a brutal massacre in the neighboring camp. Mercenaries did it, their style: cut everyone up. Looks like the sentry fell asleep at his post, and those monsters took a blade to his throat, and that was that, remember him as he was. Then they did the same to his sleeping buddies. None of our people even heard shots, that's how it was...

I want to learn more about the Zone... Did I tell you about Чёрный Сталкер [TERM?]? There's a legend, you see. They say some strange stalker appeared in the Zone; who he is, where he's from, and what he does, nobody knows. He wears a black cloak with the hood pulled up so you can't see his face, and carries no weapon. Only a few people have seen him at all, and from a distance at that, and they say unimaginable terror came over everyone who looked at him. They say even monsters shy away from him. Who is he, huh? Some say he's a new mutant, others say a ghost, and others say it's all tales from drunk stalkers and he doesn't exist at all. Hell knows... until I see him with my own eyes, I won't believe it.
I don't know yet, I only got here recently. For now I'm sitting here, getting my bearings.
I sat here and listened to all kinds of stories... What devil pulled me into coming to the Zone! I'm thinking of getting out of here while it's not too late.
I want to go see the army boys. They say you can buy some rounds from them. The local trader only gives ammo for artifacts, and where am I supposed to find him an artifact...
Nothing... A hair of the dog would be nice, that's all my plans for now.

The trader here offers jobs to choose from. There are a couple simple ones nearby, just run out and back. I'm thinking, should I take one? Only I need to scrounge up ammo somewhere first. It's nearby, sure, but who knows...

Heard shooting at the ATP? You don't know who's there now, whether there are bandits? I need to head that way, but I'm thinking I'll wait for now. They say bandits were seen recently, and I don't feel like meeting them.
Someone told me you can find artifacts a little farther out. They even say there's some way around the post. I should try it. What am I sitting here for?

Where am I going now with this leg... A couple days ago I flew into an anomaly. Good thing I only caught it with the very edge and got thrown aside. Twisted my leg, still hurts, maybe even a crack in the bone, it aches that badly.

The other day someone whispered to me about a stash, so I decided to crawl out and look. Then Boars charged me... I sat on some rocks for two hours. At first I thought about shooting them, then figured I had too little buckshot, to hell with that, I'd only make them angry and they'd never leave. Today I want to try getting through again, only around that place.
My partner and I are getting ready to take a walk. We're preparing for a run, so don't get in the way...
I'm not going anywhere. I'll sit here for a while. I'm tired of roaming the Zone already, should rest a bit. I've got money, food, and vodka for now, so I can relax.
I'll think of something. Maybe wander farther out somewhere people don't even go... Haven't decided yet.
Why are you interested? You think an experienced stalker will just tell you where he's going and why? Only rookies flap their tongues. So come on, keep walking...

I'm sick of roaming the Zone. I'm thinking maybe I should join Duty. What do you think? Seems they have decent supplies there. I don't care much about their idea; the main thing is I'll have everything I need... And if needed, I can probably earn something too... Need to think it over.

Heard about anomalous fields? Artifacts form around those fields, and if you hurry and rush there right after an emission, you can make good money. I'll wait for an emission, sit it out, then go. I know one place.

I'm thinking of doing a little repair work. See how my suit got shredded? Dogs attacked, I had just shot them down, and then Tushkanos piled on. Barely fought them off, but I did get some loot. Though all that loot might go into repairs, but fine, we'll see...

I left supplies in one noticeable place, but I can't remember where... I was a little drunk then, treating radiation. I remember a dry tree lying there and a big rock nearby, but where exactly, I can't remember. I want to take a walk, maybe I'll orient myself by the terrain.

Do you think scientists accept different monster limbs? I was told they need them. I should go to their bunker and haggle. I put down a Bloodsucker the other day, still have tails from dogs, and I chased Boars too, so I've got something from them as well...

Last week I put down a Chimera. Ran from it a long time, dodged, but beat it. While I was running, I had to drop my backpack, and I didn't notice exactly where. Good thing I had a cache. An experienced stalker always has a couple stashes with supplies. Now I'm thinking maybe I should go look for it, maybe my little backpack is still lying there... If it were empty, I wouldn't think twice; no loss. But there was something in it. I'll probably go.

I'm going to see a buddy, he's nearby. I'll check my stash while I'm at it, because you know how it goes: you barely put something down before some bastard is already sniffing around. My advice to you is, if you hide something, hide it so it doesn't get searched, or later you'll be biting your own elbows. Free advice from an experienced stalker. You'll remember me yet.
I want to find one bastard. That ugly mug screwed me over badly and ran off. Fine, the Zone puts bastards like that on their knees first. We'll see.
Fuck, another curious one... Get lost, it's none of your business where I'm going.
What-what... Nothing. People do things, and that's fine, so what do you care?...
We're drinking today. Took some nice loot... heh-heh, and those idiots didn't even understand a thing, the suckers.
Found a spot by the road. You can calmly load up on loot there, and nobody sees you. The work is nothing, loot comes right into your hands, you only need time to search...

I want to get away somewhere farther. The army boys ran a raid here recently. There was serious shooting. I sat it out in the basement, but one guy got shot. I barely even knew him, he'd only just come to us, and there you go, a bullet right away. Why play the hero? Should have sat quietly in the basement and kept his head down, but no, everyone wants to be Rambo...
Bandits have lost all fear, they're killing our people. They've got some kind of base in the Dark Valley, and soon we're going to destroy their snake pit.
I should run to base for ammo, I'm running out. Our command has started saving supplies for some reason, must be preparing for something.

One of our fighters vanished. He went to the Dark Valley, and for more than two days now, not a word. There's a bandit nest there, so the men and I are thinking of scouting it for now, figuring how to pin them all to the wall later.
I need to work on my weapon while there's time. It's shooting badly now for some reason. Because who knows - today it's quiet, tomorrow a raid by some filth, or a march somewhere.
I don't know, I just got back from a raid. I want to rest and sleep it off...
You know we've got friction with Freedom? Command told us to get all gear in order and be ready, not waste rounds. Looks like there'll be a scrap soon, so we need to prepare.
I'm not planning anything... Well, maybe I'll go to the Bar.
Nothing special... Same as always: booze, snacks, a joint... girls - virtual ones, true... ha-ha.

Tomorrow we're going after Bloodsuckers, that's what the boss said. True, he's been saying that for a week now. In the evening he plans to clear the village the next day, and by morning all he can think about is a hair of the dog. We'll see how it goes this time.

I lost my gun the other day. It was a good gun, not like this one. It's not that I was that drunk, I just leaned it somewhere because it was getting in the way of raising my glass... Need to look for where I left it. Or maybe the men are joking around, hid it somewhere themselves and think I'll buy it back... sure, keep dreaming.

Everyone was told not to scatter their junk around, keep it ready. And check your weapons too, touch them up if needed... Are we going after Boars or something? Or maybe we're expecting Duty to visit...
There's a rumor we'll be marching soon. I really don't feel like it... We've already settled into this place, quiet, calm, nobody bothers us... What got into their heads, going somewhere?

We were sitting with the men, smoking some weed... Well, puffed a little and fine, but then one fool got going and ate all the food, barely dragged him away. Now we need to look for provisions, because they say we're going somewhere soon, so we should have supplies.

I'm not doing anything. I'm sick of it all. This vodka has worn me down. I used to be normal, and now I've become a drunk here. Time to quit. Today I'll just fix myself up and quit, definitely... No, not today. Better on Monday.
I want to get a proper gun, something like a Beretta. For real men, a Beretta is just right.
We're going on a job soon, so we should at least prepare - drink a little while there's time, because later there won't be any...

I'm sick of slaving for the Boss. Why is that bastard always unhappy - this isn't enough, that isn't enough, where, and where from... He keeps thinking people want to cheat him. Sure, he's the authority, but you still have to trust your own people, seriously.
Fuck off! Who are you to ask questions here? Just a little runt, so go stand closer to the shitter.
Some sucker told us where stalkers pass through. Perfect, now we'll take them while they're warm.
None of your business.
I'm planning to shoot you... Relax, that's humor.
I'd like to take a nap while there's time. And you keep walking, don't hang around here.
Do you have a business proposal? No? Then why the hell are you bothering me...
Offer something for good pay, maybe we'll discuss it. Then I'll decide what to do.
I'm not planning to do anything. And if I were, I sure wouldn't discuss it with you.
Don't stick your nose where it doesn't belong, you'll stay in one piece.
Ask fewer questions. We don't like that here.
What, where, when?.. Maybe you want my plans in writing?
I should run out for a piece of hardware, check something.
I was about to leave here for somewhere farther away, but I spent almost all my rounds on dogs and ruined my gun. And where am I going now without ammo and a decent weapon... I'll have to wait a bit.
I want to rest. I'm dead tired. Didn't go that far, but I had to run from those little rats - they're called Tushkanos.

I played with a guard here. Won nicely, but what can you take from him? He only offers vodka. I want to try my luck in the Bar. They say you can win artifacts there. That's a more solid prize than this bootleg.

That's it, I've sat here long enough, I'm sick of it! "Artifacts, artifacts..." and there's nothing decent here, just Jellyfish. I'm going deeper into the Zone. There, yes, those aren't artifacts, those are Artifacts with a capital A!
They say my buddy was seen somewhere at Garbage. I want to take a walk there, just need to gather my things and go.

My head has been splitting lately. Especially after the emission. Never had that before. They supposedly sell some kind of headache medicine in the Bar, that's what I was told. I should go there, because my head is about to crack... Or maybe I'm already turning into a zombie? Someone told a story like that. God forbid... No, I need to get to the Bar urgently. At least I'll drink there and my head will pass.

I'll go to the Bar soon. Do you know where to get a decent gun for money? Here it's only for arts, and even then just Kalashes. I want something more solid. The men say go to the Bar, maybe someone there will offer something.
I'll sit here for now. I don't want to go anywhere. I should look around and get used to this area, then I'll decide what to do.

They say a stalker died somewhere nearby. Very recently. I'll go rummage around, maybe there's still something I can pull off him. And don't look at me like that... everyone does it. He doesn't care anymore, and we still have to live somehow.

I heard you can find different recipes to cook a bad artifact into a good one, or a good one into a super-good one. Only everyone keeps quiet like fish, nobody wants to talk. Everyone thinks only he should have that super-duper little recipe. But if it's such valuable information, there has to be someone who sells it. Need to find that trader.

Damn it! I recently made a deal with Sidorovich for dog tails, ran around all day, burned through so many rounds. Well, I brought them, and he had disappeared somewhere. What do I need those tails for? I sold them. Then Sidorovich shows up: "Where are my tails?" Where was he wandering?! Now I have to chase dogs again. That's exactly what I'm getting ready to do.
I'm going to the Swamps. Someone just whispered to me about a path... only I won't tell you. Find your own path.
We dug up a lot in a week. Now we need to sell it. I'll make the rounds of my stashes and go to the traders.
Bandit scum has worn us down. They keep coming and coming... like cockroaches - squash one, and another is already peeking from behind the baseboard. We want to crush them all.
I have only one plan: gather as much as I can and sell it for as much as I can. What else do you need?
I should patch up my armor somewhere. There was supposedly some craftsman sitting on the Cordon, and one in the Bar too. Maybe I should stop by... one or the other.
Turns out you can get to Санаторий [TERM?]. I don't know the road, but our people are getting ready to go, so I'll go with them.
They said Agroprom is swimming in artifacts. Probably lying, but it wouldn't hurt to check.
You know, there are some laboratories... The men said it's better not to poke your nose in there. But I'd be interested to see what's inside.
I'll go somewhere to Garbage. There's a bandit snake pit not far from here, and I'm sick of them already. You walk carefully. They can be worse than monsters.
Why go anywhere when it's good here? We've got everything for now - food, drink. It's quiet here, calm. Live and let live.
I don't like those Duty grunts. I don't like being ordered around. Freedom, now that's what I need. There you're your own master. I should get closer to them.

Our plans are simple: crush every bastard who carries filth out of the Zone. First we'll smash Freedom, then the bandits, and then we'll deal with stalkers too, if they don't settle down by then. They keep finding all kinds of filth and dragging it to traders. That's how this infection spreads.
Whatever we plan to do, our cause was, is, and always will be righteous.
We've been killing those Freedom deadbeats, and we'll keep killing them. That is our goal and task right now.
Looks like you've got nothing to do? Then run to the Bar and sign up, then into formation! Meaning, into our orderly ranks.
What is there to do now? We'll rest, relax... and tomorrow back to the post.

No matter how you look at it, I have to go on duty again. They say: "Show some civic spirit, we're short on men..." What civic spirit, damn it, when for a month now I've been strapping on the duty belt every other day? I don't remember even the army being like this. Idlers like you wear out your pants at the Bar, and I, apparently, have to show civic spirit for all of you...
I misplaced my PDA somewhere. Need to look for it. Or maybe someone's stealing them from our boys, since this isn't the first case... If I find out, I'll kill him on the spot!
Why did I ever join Duty? I used to do stalker work too. Maybe I should drop all this and go back... if they let me, which they probably won't. Yeah... I'm in deep.

As always, we'll establish order... a new order! Everyone as one, orderly ranks! And all sorts of unbelievers, like the junkies from Freedom, we'll root them out. No funny business! We'll get what we want! Everyone will march as one!

Our task is simple - rid the Earth of this plague. That's what we do every day, and what we'll keep doing. And it's time for you to understand it, meaning let our idea sink in. You look like a decent man - not spoiled by the Zone yet. So there's only one road for you - to us, to Duty.
What? You give a damn about my plans and what I'm going to do? Get lost!
We're going on a job soon. Going to collect some "debts" from the Duty grunts. How long can we put up with their shakedowns? Time to put the screws to them.
Oh, speaking of business! I've got a bottle stashed, so there is business after all.
Got any grub? I'm hungry, need to find something to eat.

I'm leaving this place, I'm sick of all of it. Sure, in a crowd some things are better, but being alone isn't bad either - nobody knows anything, nobody says too much, no need to split the take. And in general, you're your own boss and master.
And who told me the Zone was the Klondike?! If I could find that bastard now, I'd shove his face into the shithole he sent me into.
Listen, pal, don't go sniffing around too much here. Who, what, where... some smartass you are...
How would I know? I don't make plans for myself; whatever hand I get dealt, that's how it'll be.
It's time to get moving on a job, instead of sitting here... grown into one spot. Soon you won't get anyone to lift his ass at all.
Why are you buzzing around here asking questions? Are you a prosecutor or something, that I have to answer you?
I'm going to sleep. Some people sleep like the dead, and I'm supposed to stand guard over them. All of you can go to hell, I'm sick of it!
We brought down one hell of a boar! We'll feast, drink, make merry, and snack on boar meat. Drop by the fire.

Those ex-cops don't understand a damn thing - I mean the Duty grunts. They should sit in the Bar and keep out of here, but no - they keep pushing in, dumb as zombies. We'll smack them in the teeth again if they show up, then again, and then some.
Tomorrow it's our shift to rot at the checkpoint. Damn, I really don't want to, but I'll have to.

Lukash keeps saying we shouldn't waste ammo. And he says we should drink less, too. Well, ammo I understand, but why limit yourself on drinking? We've been dry for two whole days already. Right now we'll wet that dry spell.

The senior tells me, go recruit stalkers to our side, he says, because Duty is recruiting them and we need to lure them over. Like I've got nothing better to do, sure, I'm racing off... They'll come by themselves. No normal guy will stay in Duty for long. They'll all crawl over to us, no recruiting needed.
There's a job nearby, just need to wait for night...

We stashed a crate of vodka somewhere recently. Now nobody remembers where. We couldn't have drunk the whole crate back then... though those mugs could drain a crate in one evening. Need to search properly.
I'm thinking: to drink or not to drink? On one hand, a drink wouldn't hurt. On the other, I absolutely can't today... but I want to. So I'm thinking.
I'll take more food, booze, ammo, and get the hell out of here, somewhere quiet. I'm sick of everything. I can't look at these drunk and stoned faces anymore.
I'm thinking who'd be best to hand the artifacts over to. One stalker here set me up with them. Maybe quietly run to the Cordon? The Bar's dangerous, somebody might find out.
Today or tomorrow we'll go drop some bloodsuckers. They've bred again... Where do they even come from?
I'm going to shoot cats. They make fine mittens and hats. Dogs make good fur boots, too. It's not winter now, sure, but as they say: "prepare your sled in summer".
Same as usual. We'll shoot wildlife, what else...
We'll rest, then go beyond the bridge and hunt there.
The guys are planning to go to Туманная чаща [TERM?]. I don't know why drag myself there when there's plenty of game right here...
Our boys want to go after a bloodsucker. They say they saw one in Чаща [TERM?]. I'm not going, to hell with that... A Bloodsucker isn't a Boar or a Flesh.
We'll sit, rest, get some food in us... In short, we're not going anywhere today, and tomorrow we'll see.
Forget your business... it can wait. Sit down, have a drink, grab a bite, and tomorrow come hunting with us.
I'm thinking of weaving a net for tushkanos. They're stupid, they run in a whole pack at once, so we could take them all in one go... Just need to find some rope.
Why so curious? I need to visit the bushes. Coming with me? We'll squat side by side and have a nice little chat...
I'm going to Agroprom. Some buddy there is offering a good assault rifle. Costs a whole crate of vodka! Greedy bastard...

I need to find some powder, laundry powder... You can find anything here if you want - cocaine, heroin, even LSD... Any kind you like. But laundry powder? You can't find it in broad daylight with a lantern.
I've got huge plans. I'm going to find loot so good that all at once - bang! And you're a millionaire. Then bam! - exchanged the money, snap! - and you're in the Canaries...

There's a rumor that the Agroprom underground is packed with goods beyond counting. They crawl in there practically in their underwear with a slingshot, and come out in exoskeletons, loaded with loot, with three assault rifles hanging from each neck. I want to touch that... fairy tale too.
I was told some oddball in Dark Valley buys tushkano heads. I beat down a ridiculous pile of them! But I never figured out who's buying, so I need to go look, because they've started stinking...

There's this angle - I'm thinking of taking a run to Sultan... Know him? Hey, buddy, you don't know a damn thing! He's the real deal. If you need to score a gun that shoots where it needs to all by itself, look for Sultan, and you'll be happy! And he splits everything fair with the guys. Not like this one... Only Султаныч [TERM?] charges serious money, but it's worth it...
Need to get my teeth fixed. Haven't slept for two days, my whole face is swollen. Need to find a doctor. Know where?

I picked up a good artifact in one place and thought: here it is, happiness, ha!.. I ordered a serious suit, they tell me the order's ready, come pick it up. I signal that I'll grab it now, run to the stash for the artifact, stick my nose into the container, and there's a pile of some kind of shit! Now I don't even know what to do...

Bought some sausage from some bastard, now my belly's killing me. Looking for pills, searched every medkit the boys have - everything is there, but no loperamide or anything like it. Crawling from bush to bush and eating charcoal from campfires. Misery.
Barkeep asked me to find some guy, said he owed him. So I'm looking, he promised to make it worth my while...
I want out of here! My hair's coming out in clumps, my ribs have been broken three times. Dogs bit me too, maybe it got infected - won't heal at all... To hell with all this extreme shit!

There he goes, sniffing around... There was one curious, talkative type here, and by morning there was no loot and no gun, the little bastard had been casing it all and swiped it. Move along, man. I don't know you and you don't know me. Don't make me do something we'll both regret!
You're simple as a penny, man! Walked up and started trying to be friends right away... You're a stranger, sorry, but I'm not going anywhere with you.

Need to go gather some broken crates; firewood's running out. If you poke around here, there are boxes all over... By the way, where do they come from, do you know? Have you heard about the death trucks yet? Ah, right... sorry. Anyway, I think those trucks carry more than just corpses; they haul junk too, crates, empty containers, maybe not so empty... So when you suddenly find a pile of crates, it's clear a truck passed through recently. Only one problem: where do the trucks themselves go afterward...

Why are you asking so much? You'd be better off doing something useful yourself: haul over a couple of empty boxes for firewood - look how many they've dragged in again. Rookies come in and haul whole chests with them like hamsters, one dragging a wooden box, another a metal one. They think they'll immediately find a heap of artifacts here, pack the box full, and adieu. Sure, keep dreaming!

Heard a chopper flew over somewhere again? Seems they're carrying some kind of cargo, but where, for whom? And where do they land in the Zone? I think they don't land at all; they drop different crates from above, and people haul them off later... But who sponsors all of it is impossible to understand... Means somebody benefits from keeping people here and feeding them at least like this. Nothing but riddles in this Zone...
Get lost, will you? What kind of crap are you spouting?
What shooter... We're all shooters here... Well, every other man, maybe...
Strelok? Who's that supposed to be? Hm... Haven't heard anything.
Uh... Is that some kind of nickname? I don't remember, I don't think there was anything like that.
A shooter or a stalker? I didn't quite hear... Which stalker, be specific! Ah, Strelok... No, haven't heard of him.
Strelok... Strelok... Something's rattling around in my head, like someone told me. Damn, can't remember!

Of course I've heard. Don't you know? He was one of the first to load up with loot here and slip out of the Zone. Now he's probably got a villa in the Canaries. What else? I'd have done the same... Ah, if I had loot like his, but you probably won't find that kind anymore.

Are you asking about that Strelok, the one they say made it to the center? Yeah, there's a story like that, but I don't really buy it, though who knows... there are rumors about the center, so somebody must have been there, why not Strelok. But honestly, I don't care.

Strelok, you say... Heard something about him, only it all seems like bullshit to me. Like he reached the center and all that. All kinds of stories about him go around, but it all smells like folklore... or fairy tales, like Мюнхгаузен [TERM?].

Why don't you ask about Семецкий [TERM?] too, and I'll tell you where he was and where he died... They're myths of the Zone, isn't that clear? Don't fall for all that crap... People say all kinds of things about Семецкий [TERM?] or that same Strelok.
Heard of him. They say he was a tough stalker. I don't even know how long you have to live in the Zone to grow into it like Strelok did... A legend, that's the word. And where is he now?..

They say all kinds of things... I don't believe all of it, of course, but on the other hand, why not. Say, the Wild West once had its own legends and hard men too... Everyone knew them, and those people really existed. So why couldn't there be one here... I don't know, anyway.

Strelok? Yeah... definitely a legend... I mean, a real hard man, not just some nobody like you and me. All right, don't take offense... really, people say a lot about Strelok, whether it's all worth believing is another question. But if they talk, that means such a man definitely existed, or exists, or maybe he's some kind of collective image... A mystery, in a word.

Heard they say he made it all the way to the center of the Zone. They're probably lying about that, because if he reached the center, everyone would have charged into the center already, since the route was known. I figure Strelok is something like Чёрный Сталкер [TERM?] or whatever, just stalker tales, you know, local fairy stories. Though who knows, maybe somebody really did get somewhere.

Sure I've heard. Heard he was making his way to the center of the Zone... Whether he made it or not, I don't know. Those stories about him were interesting for a while, I don't even remember now. Truth is, most of them were jokes like about Штирлиц [TERM?] or Чапаев [TERM?]... But think for yourself: if a man hadn't done something out of the ordinary, nobody would tell stories about him at all...

Yeah, Strelok is definitely a legend... no less. Could you handle five Chimeras and a Controller alone, all at once? He could. Well, maybe they exaggerate a bit, but still, imagine how tough you'd have to be, even if they added a couple of Chimeras...

I think he's a very unusual stalker, but it's not even about him. Fine, say he reached the center of the Zone, fine, handled monsters with one hand tied behind his back, but tell me, how did anyone else learn about it? Everyone couldn't have made up the same stories at once, and I've heard plenty, I won't repeat all that nonsense to you... I'm just personally curious who went with him and told it all in such detail, huh? All right, forget it...

I heard people in the Bar talking about him, saying he stocked up completely to go to the center of the Zone. They even say he was looking for partners, but people weren't too eager to hire on with his team... You never know; he goes God knows where, he might crawl out himself, but his partner? There... people didn't trust him much. Haven't heard talk about him for a long time; you're probably the first to ask lately. I don't even know what to answer...

They said this Strelok wasn't a stalker at all, but some kind of spec-ops type. I'm telling you straight! I heard he took down a squad of mercenaries without breaking a sweat. Well? What, you don't think he's special forces?

I don't know whether they were talking about Strelok or not, but something like that is on the tip of my tongue... Like one tough guy laid out almost the whole Agroprom, soldiers and all... Probably bullshit, but since you asked, that's what came to mind.

Strelok, I'll tell you, was a born stalker... meaning he still exists somewhere, I think. I didn't know him, but I was told he could bring back things that would make your mother weep, wherever the hell you could even find them! Things like he brought back, nobody anywhere ever found. That's how it was...

Yeah, heard of him. But I'll tell you this: I don't like him much. There's something seriously suspicious about him. Judge for yourself: walks around the Zone like it's his own home, brings back unbelievable loot... and in general... I don't like it. Better don't bring him up again.

I heard... just between us, of course, that Diodor somehow put a charm on him. Because whenever he comes back from a run, he disappears somewhere. And note, Diodor disappears too. Then both come back, he unloads the loot, and the Bar parties for a week... Something's off here.

Strelok is a stalker, I'll tell you... well, a stalker not like you and me. I didn't know him personally, but I knew one man who went on a run with him. So in that run he ended up completely naked - I mean an anomaly ate his gear, but he managed to crawl out. Strelok helped him - gave him some supplies, patched him up. Saved him, in short... So I'd go on a run with Strelok without question.

Yeah... He was a stalker, not like today's rookies. He used to go alone... no, can you imagine, alone, into the bloodsucker village. Could you do that? Well, if you made it through alone, I'd definitely think you were Strelok... ha... All right, don't twitch, nobody else can do that.

He was a born stalker. I didn't know him, but people told me... Said he went to Radar alone... Just between us, I don't believe it, but an authoritative stalker said it, so I nodded along. Personally, I think it's impossible - alone through Radar.

I heard he worked with someone. Well, I didn't hear it myself, but one guy told me someone told him that he had a whole crew. And they split whatever loot they found, but that one thing they didn't split, and after that Strelok disappeared... That's what I heard.
Yeah, I think it's all crap. Sure, someone distinguished himself somewhere, so what? Of course rumors start, and gossip piles on. Don't stuff your head with it...

You asked about Strelok, and I'll tell you this: anyone who stands out in the Zone is already a legend. Yeah. Because if you're a fool, you'll die as soon as things get tight, and if you survive, you're already a legend... Probably same with Strelok. So he had some rough scrape somewhere and survived; why yell "legend" across the whole Zone now...

Buddy, forget those stories, that's my advice. People say all kinds of things; if you listen and try to measure up to hardcases like that, I'm telling you straight - you won't last a month. In the Zone you don't need to be a legend, more like a wise little minnow... It helps you survive.
Don't remember anyone like that... Remind me what was so special he did, then I'll tell you... Well, if not, then not.
Is he the one who was filling everyone's ears in the Bar about how he made it to the center of the Zone? Or are you asking about someone else? I didn't quite get it...
Who? You believe that kind of crap? I can make up as many stories as you want about how I kissed the Monolith or made a wish... In short, forget it!
What Strelok? What kind of handle is that? Never heard it.
Is that some kind of nickname? I don't remember, don't think there was anything like that.
Who he is, I don't know. If he were some authority, everyone would know, but nobody's heard of him.
Strelok... Something's rattling around in my head, can't remember.
Whose crew is he from? What kind of boys does he run with? Find that out, then ask. We don't have any like that here...
Is that the one who filled everyone's ears about how he reached the center of the Zone? I could spin you a million fairy tales like that...
Who? What, is he supposed to be tough enough that everyone should know him? I don't know any authority like that.
Are you looking for Жека-Стрелок [TERM?]? You won't find him - dogs are already finishing off his bones; he flew into an anomaly drunk. Idiot.
One buddy told me about some Strelok, I think... Don't remember exactly what; we were drinking then, but something interesting about him, like he hit a decent jackpot.
It's all bullshit... pure chatter... There is no Strelok and never was anyone with a handle like that.
You people and this Strelok. Someone already asked before you... Looks like this Strelok screwed him hard, so he was looking for him... obvious what for.
Forget it! You won't find him. Looking for someone by name in the Zone is a dead end. Maybe he's already changed ten nicknames and twenty places.
Haven't heard of him... What do you need him for? Did he rip you off or what? That's your business, but there's nobody like that here...
Heard something about someone like that. They say he's some kind of badass. Only he hasn't been here, otherwise everyone would know.
Is he one of the stalkers or what? I don't know, maybe we've seen him, but our boys don't ask their names - frisk them and let them pass... Asking every stalker his name is too much honor.
There was some talk in the Bar about Strelok, I think. I gathered people didn't trust him much - too quick and nimble for the Zone. Here one moment, there the next...
I meet him every day! Matter of fact, there he goes. Sick of him bumming cigarettes; he refuses to smoke his own on principle, says they're all a special brand - "shooter smokes".
You can't count all the shooters around here! One fires, another blasts away...
I haven't heard anything about you either, and you're asking me about some Strelok...

Wait, wait... Recently some boys were walking somewhere from the Garbage, then three more rolled up to them... There was one with a bald spot, he shot clean, from one knee, bang-bang! Boar down in two shots - legs up, dog in one - face in the dirt, smack... I'm telling you straight! And his crew called him a shooter, that happened. Only they all left somewhere right away...

There was one here... a sniper. Always carried a little notebook. Went after artifacts and marked the route in it, kept writing things down. Shot excellently - on a bet, they say, he put a hole through a coin from fifty meters with a PM. Yeah, sure, he was one hell of a shooter... Then boars trampled him on the Garbage, buried long ago.

Who? Strelok, Strelok... Ah! The one who stole a suit from Ваня Варежка [TERM?]? Put it on and ran off somewhere. Did he swipe something from you too, is that why you're looking for him? Not the one? Well, I don't know then...
I knew one shooter. A real cowboy. Fired pistols with both hands, showing off. Showed off so much the bloodsuckers ate him, only his slippers were left.

Someone by the campfire was saying there's a little crew of guys who rummage where even a snork is afraid to stick its snout. Strelok was supposedly their ringleader. So he led them all straight to the next world... They got wiped out somewhere at Yantar... Only rumors are left of them.
I know him! A month ago he borrowed a pack of 5.45 rounds from me. Just for a week, the damn swindler... If I meet him, I'll kill him! If you see him anywhere, whistle for me too.

Who is that? Not the one who recently handed some "Бабкины бусы [TERM?]" to Barkeep in the Bar? Know that artifact? Right, me neither. And he found it. Where, he didn't say... Took a fat haul for it, and that's understandable, if it really is an artifact, things like that don't lie under every bush. Lucky bastard!
Strelok? I've not only heard of him, I've seen him. He's sitting in the Swamps right now, look for him there.
He's that red-haired one, built like a wardrobe. Interesting tattoo he's got, right? A church with domes... He's probably in Dark Valley now...
There was an old guy like that; Voronin wanted to bring him and his group under his thumb, so Duty members killed the lot of them.
He already left the Zone. He and the mercenaries stole some secret chemical reconnaissance vehicle from the military and took off.
